assertions.description: TextEncoder is exposed — the helper used by Protected Audience scripts to push strings into WASM linear memory.
TextDecoder is exposed — the helper for pulling string data out of WASM linear memory.
TextEncoder.prototype.encodeInto is the function Protected Audience helpers rely on for zero-copy conversion.
TextEncoder/TextDecoder round-trip a Unicode string through a Uint8Array.
assertions.test: (()=>{const enc=new TextEncoder();const dec=new TextDecoder();const s='turtledove \u{1F422}';return dec.decode(enc.encode(s))===s;})()

assertions.description: WebAssembly.Memory is exposed — the linear memory target for the text conversion helpers.
